# Anduril to Demonstrate Rocket Motors for Navy Standard Missile-6

Anduril has been awarded a $19 million contract to design, build, and test second stage rocket motors for use in the U.S. Navy's Standard Missile-6 (SM-6), a highly-versatile missile for defeating air, surface, and hypersonic missile threats that is deployable on 60 surface ships.
